001package net.okocraft.box.api.command;
002
003import net.kyori.adventure.text.Component;
004import org.bukkit.command.CommandSender;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.Unmodifiable;
007
008import java.util.List;
009import java.util.Set;
010
011/**
012 * An interface of the command.
013 */
014public interface Command {
015
016    /**
017     * Gets the command name.
018     *
019     * @return the command name
020     */
021    @NotNull String getName();
022
023    /**
024     * Gets the permission node.
025     *
026     * @return the permission node
027     */
028    @NotNull String getPermissionNode();
029
030    /**
031     * Gets the set of aliases.
032     *
033     * @return the set of aliases
034     */
035    @NotNull @Unmodifiable Set<String> getAliases();
036
037    /**
038     * Gets the helps.
039     *
040     * @return the helps
041     */
042    @NotNull Component getHelp();
043
044    /**
045     * Executes the command.
046     * <p>
047     * When this method is called, the executor has the permission
048     * and the length of the argument array is greater than or equal to 1.
049     *
050     * @param sender the executor
051     * @param args   the array of arguments
052     */
053    void onCommand(@NotNull CommandSender sender, @NotNull String[] args);
054
055    /**
056     * Gets the tab-completion.
057     * <p>
058     * When this method is called, the executor has the permission
059     * and the length of the argument array is greater than or equal to 1.
060     *
061     * @param sender the executor
062     * @param args   the array of arguments
063     * @return the result of the tab-completion or an empty list
064     */
065    @NotNull List<String> onTabComplete(@NotNull CommandSender sender, @NotNull String[] args);
066}
